original_image_tags: A stamped label centered near the bottom of the page. The label is a grey rectangle with a black border, containing the text "Released in Full" in bold, sans-serif font.

elements.description: A rectangular box at the bottom center containing the text 'Released in Full'. Additionally, the words 'UNCLASSIFIED' and 'SBU' are printed at the top and bottom left, and 'Page 2 of 5' is at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Description A describes only a single stamped label with 'Released in Full' as the visual content, while Description B adds additional specific quoted text elements ('UNCLASSIFIED', 'SBU', 'Page 2 of 5') that are not mentioned by Description A, creating a factual inconsistency about the visual content.
